description: Round-4 FINAL shipped model. Round-3 GBT+logistic base PLUS a deterministic GRU neural sub-ensemble (3 seeds averaged) for model-class diversity. The recurrent net integrates break evidence over time -- a different inductive bias from trees (rank-corr ~0.83 vs the 0.97-0.99 GBT-GBT), which is the round-4 lift.
blend: base = 0.8*mean(GBT logits) + 0.2*logistic logit; final = 0.6*base + 0.4*mean(GRU logits), then sigmoid
gru_arch: single-layer torch.nn.GRU(152 calibrated feats -> H) + linear head, BCEWithLogits with elapsed-ramp weights, best epoch by VAL TS-AUC, cosine LR. Trained OFFLINE (PyTorch/MPS); weights exported to numpy and embedded as base64; inference is exact float64-numpy GRU recurrence (no torch, no RNG) -> deterministic, O(H)/step.
w_gru_sensitivity: blend flat 0.6157-0.6161 across W_GRU 0.35-0.50 (robust plateau); shipped W_GRU=0.40.

reduced_test_ab.note: 100-series reduced test, ids>=10000 the GRU never saw in training (true OOS).

trainer: scripts/train_seq.py (kept in repo for the Out-of-Sample retraining phase)
determinism: numpy float64 GRU forward -> shipped path exact; smoke max|diff| = 0.0 (<= 1e-8)

leaderboard_context.note: round-4 VAL 0.6161 clears the top-10 cutoff on the internal split.
